title: AI on Kubernetes? EKS Auto Mode Handles the Burst
summary: AWS EKS Auto Mode automatically manages GPU instance provisioning and scaling for AI workloads on Kubernetes, minimizing idle time and reducing infrastructure costs. The service optimizes burst capacity handling to keep expensive GPU resources efficiently utilized.
